name: 15 · Stream Python Body
description: The Python body IS the reducer (docs/25). A producer AutomatedStep declares a Data/Out channel 'words' and writes 4 elements (the/quick/brown/fox) over an out-of-band transport. A reducer AutomatedStep declares a Data/In channel 'words' wired from the producer's open handle and drains the stream in-process via aithericon.stream('words') — uppercasing and concatenating each element into 'THE QUICK BROWN FOX'. The script owns the reduction logic; no container node, no Petri-net gather barrier — the net sees only the producer's open + close (data bytes never enter the marking).
